title: Board reading dates in the past
excerpt: I have a board that includes dates for when building inspections expire. I have separate groups depending on when things expire, like ‘expiring in 30 days’, ‘expiring in 15 days’ and finally, ‘Certificate expired’. When …

posts.author: rachelke (Rachel Keiser)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board that includes dates for when building inspections expire. I have separate groups depending on when things expire, like ‘expiring in 30 days’, ‘expiring in 15 days’ and finally, ‘Certificate expired’. When we create new items, if the inspection has a date that is in the past, the board does not read past dates, so it keeps them in ‘In Compliance’ when they really should be in Certificate Expired/the expired category. I’d love for there to be a feature that dates are able to be read even if they are past.
